is a handball team from [Lemvig](/wiki/Lemvig "Lemvig"), [Denmark](/wiki/Denmark "Denmark"). It plays in the [Danish Handball League](/wiki/Danish_Handball_League "Danish Handball League"). Their head coach is Arne Damgaard.[[2]](#cite_note-2)

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Danish handball club

| Lemvig-Thyborøn Håndbold | |
| --- | --- |

| Founded | 1969 |
| Arena | [Vestjysk BANK Arena](/wiki/Vestjysk_BANK_Arena "Vestjysk BANK Arena")[[1]](#cite_note-court-1) |
| Capacity | 1.400 [[1]](#cite_note-court-1) |
| Head coach | [Dennis Bo Jensen](/w/index.php?title=Dennis_Bo_Jensen&action=edit&redlink=1 "Dennis Bo Jensen (page does not exist)") |
| League | [Håndboldligaen](/wiki/Danish_Handball_League "Danish Handball League") (men) |
| [2023–24](/wiki/2023%E2%80%9324_H%C3%A5ndboldligaen "2023–24 Håndboldligaen") | Håndboldligaen, 14th out of 14 |
| Club colours |  |
| |  |  | | --- | --- | | [Team colours](/wiki/File:Kit_left_arm.svg "Team colours")    [Team colours](/wiki/File:Kit_body.svg "Team colours")    [Team colours](/wiki/File:Kit_right_arm.svg "Team colours")    [Team colours](/wiki/File:Kit_shorts.svg "Team colours")  **Home** | [Team colours](/wiki/File:Kit_left_arm.svg "Team colours")    [Team colours](/wiki/File:Kit_body.svg "Team colours")    [Team colours](/wiki/File:Kit_right_arm.svg "Team colours")    [Team colours](/wiki/File:Kit_shorts.svg "Team colours")  **Away** | | |
| **Website**   [Official site](https://lt-haandbold.dk/) | |

**Lemvig-Thyborøn Håndbold** is a handball team from [Lemvig](/wiki/Lemvig "Lemvig"), [Denmark](/wiki/Denmark "Denmark"). It plays in the [Danish Handball League](/wiki/Danish_Handball_League "Danish Handball League"). Their head coach is Arne Damgaard.[[2]](#cite_note-2)

Lemvig-Thyborøn Håndbold's license belongs to the parent club Lemvig Nissum Håndbold, which was founded way back in 1969, under the name NNFH Lemvig.[[3]](#cite_note-3) Later, a professional elite division was created for the best men's team, first under the name Lemvig Håndbold, and later Lemvig-Thyborøn Håndbold.

The best result in club history was when the club won the [Danish Men's Handball Cup](/wiki/Danish_Men%27s_Handball_Cup "Danish Men's Handball Cup") in 1984. Their best league result ever was a third place finish in the top league in 1987.

In the [2023–24 season](/wiki/2023%E2%80%9324_H%C3%A5ndboldligaen "2023–24 Håndboldligaen") they were relegated to the [1st Division](/wiki/Danish_1st_Division_(handball) "Danish 1st Division (handball)") after finishing last in the league.[[4]](#cite_note-4)

[![Location of Lemvig-Thyborøn Håndbold](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/a/a8/Denmark_adm_location_map.svg/330px-Denmark_adm_location_map.svg.png)](/wiki/File:Denmark_adm_location_map.svg "Location of Lemvig-Thyborøn Håndbold")
